channel.title: AI Daily - AI News · Tools · Monetization · Productivity
channel.description: Hourly-updated AI blog covering the latest AI news, tool reviews, money-making methods, and productivity tips.

item.title: AI Productivity in 2026: Autonomous Agents, Workflow Automation & Measured Gains
item.description: 2026 productivity playbook: shift from chatbots to autonomous agents with OpenClaw and n8n, context-aware AI workflows, unified workspaces, role-specific time savings (PMs 8.5h/wk, devs 12h/wk, founders 15h/wk).

item.title: How to Make Money with AI in 2026: 7 Proven Side Hustles & Real Earnings
item.description: Proven AI monetization strategies for 2026: AI Automation Agency ($5K-$15K/mo), selling AI agents as subscriptions ($47-$197/mo), AI consulting ($100-$300/hr), vibe coding, Faceless YouTube, and real earnings data from practitioners.

item.title: Best AI Tools of May 2026: 30 Essential Tools to Supercharge Your Workflow
item.description: Best AI tools of May 2026: GitHub trending open-source projects (mempalace, graphify, caveman), Needle 26M on-device model, Cursor vs Copilot review, Claude vs GPT-5.4 vs Gemini comparison, team-tested productivity picks.

item.title: AI News May 2026: GPT-5.5-Cyber, Google I/O, Orbital Computing & Healthcare Breakthroughs
item.description: May 2026 AI news roundup: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5-Cyber, Anthropic leases SpaceX supercomputer, Google Gemini expansion, AI detects heart disease from bone scans, Harvard ER study, UK Sovereign AI fund.

item.title: AI Productivity in 2026: Agentic Workflows, Automation & Practical Guides
item.description: Practical AI productivity guide for 2026: agentic workflows with Claude MCP & Zapier, cross-app automation with n8n/Make, meeting assistants, prompt engineering. Real solutions you can implement today.

item.title: The AI Automation Agency: How to Build a One-Person Business That Prints Money in 2026
item.description: 2026 is the year of the AI Automation Agency (AAA). Real case studies, tool stacks, and a step-by-step playbook for building a one-person business that generates $5K-$15K/month.

item.title: Best AI Tools to Try in May 2026 (Including Free Options)
item.description: Curated recommendations for the hottest AI tools in May 2026, covering video generation, coding assistants, content creation, and productivity boosters with free tiers.

item.title: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI in Enterprise Market Share for the First Time
item.description: Latest data from May 2026: Anthropic claims 34.4% of paid enterprise customers vs OpenAI's 32.3%. Google also warns AI-powered cyberattacks are now operational.

item.title: AI Daily Launches — Tracking the Latest in AI Every Hour
item.description: AI Daily is now live! An AI-powered blog that automatically searches and reports the latest AI news, tool recommendations, money-making methods, and productivity tips every hour.
